summary: Tested backend and frontend for lineups delete-all + grouping changes. Backend public API checks passed on discovered live host; frontend runtime verification is partially blocked by Flutter web selector limitations and missing manager credentials.

ui_bugs.issue: Core controls are visible but not reliably selectable with Playwright text/role locators in this environment, limiting deterministic E2E validation of lineups page interactions.
ui_bugs.selector: get_by_text('Registrati', exact=True) and similar Flutter-rendered controls

integration_issues.flow: Delete-all visibility + grouped day dropdown runtime checks
integration_issues.issue: Unable to complete runtime validation for captain/vice-only UI controls because test credentials are not provided and manager state could not be reached via Playwright in this runtime.

action_items: Provide captain and vice-captain test credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md to validate permission-based UI visibility end-to-end.
Add stable Flutter test hooks/semantics keys for auth and lineups controls to enable deterministic Playwright verification.
Main agent should run a manual runtime check as captain/vice for: delete-all button visibility, delete-all confirmation, and day-group default open state.
critical_code_review_comments: Route precedence is correct: DELETE '/all' is declared before DELETE '/:id', so '/all' is not shadowed by param route.
Delete-all endpoint enforces permissions via ensureCanManageLineups(principal) in service layer.
UI delete-all action is correctly gated with canManageLineups && lineups.isNotEmpty in AppBar actions.
Delete-all confirmation is implemented as a simple AlertDialog with explicit cancel/confirm actions.
Grouping by day and collapsible dropdown behavior are implemented via groupedByDay + _LineupsDayGroupCard.
Initial collapse logic matches requirement: first load collapses all days, then expands current day only if present; if absent, all remain collapsed.
test_credentials: Missing: /app/memory/test_credentials.md says no persisted test credentials.
seed_data_creation: Created temporary auth users via /api/auth/register for API smoke/regression checks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use backend host discovered from runtime network: https://squadra-backend-hdz6.onrender.com . Current pytest suite already validates /api/lineups/all existence/auth behavior and basic lineups regression. Manager-only CRUD test is conditional and currently skipped when newly registered user lacks manage-lineups permissions.
rca of the issue: Primary blocker for full requested verification is environmental: Flutter web controls are not reliably machine-selectable via Playwright locators in this container, and no captain/vice credentials are available. Backend feature correctness is strongly supported by source review + API behavior tests, but complete UI permission-state validation remains pending manual/self-test with real privileged accounts.
